zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Wilcock於1545年出生在英國越可爾米費爾德時，他的父親Richard Wilcock20歲，母親Ann Watterhouse22歲。他於1570年9月3日與Jennet Fox在英國越可爾米費爾德結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1592年4月4日在他的家鄉享年47歲，埋葬在英國越可爾米費爾德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Wilcock于1545年出生在英国越可爾米費爾德时，他的父亲Richard Wilcock20岁，母亲Ann Watterhouse22岁。他于1570年9月3日与Jennet Fox在英国越可爾米費爾德结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1592年4月4日在他的家乡享年47岁，埋葬在英国越可爾米費爾德。

nameMeanings.name: Wilcock
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): from the Middle English personal name Wilcoc, a pet form of William (composed of the elements Will 1 + the hypocoristic suffix -cok; see Cocke ).

variants.name: Wilcockson
meanings: English (Derbyshire and Nottinghamshire): patronymic meaning ‘son of   Wilcock  ’.

variants.name: William
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from the Middle English personal name William, Willam, Willem, an Old Picard and Norman French form of ancient Germanic Willihelm, composed of the elements wil- ‘will, desire’ + helm- ‘helmet, protection’. This Norman personal name became widely used in England, Scotland and Wales after the Conquest, mainly no doubt in honor of the Conqueror himself. By the 13th century it had already become the most popular personal name in England. A Parisian form of the name Guillaume was also sometimes used (see Gillam ), which in medieval Wales was adopted as Gwilym (see Gwilliam ).
Americanized form (translation into English) of French   Guillaume  .

variants.name: Wilcott
meanings: English (Somerset and Gloucestershire): habitational name from Willicote in Clifford Chambers (Gloucestershire). The placename derives from Old English wilig ‘willow’ + cot ‘cottage, hut, shelter’. In some cases perhaps an altered form of Wilcock .

variants.name: Wilcox
meanings: English (Yorkshire, Lancashire, and Flintshire): variant of Wilcock , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s. This form of the surname is based on the pronunciation.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Wilcock was born in 1545, in Mirfield, Yorkshire, England, his father, Richard Wilcock, was 20 and his mother, Ann Watterhouse, was 22. He married Jennet Fox on 3 September 1570, in Mirfield, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 4 April 1592, in his hometown, at the age of 47, and was buried in Mirfield, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Wilcock est né en 1545, à Mirfield, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Richard Wilcock, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Ann Watterhouse, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Jennet Fox le 3 septembre 1570, à Mirfield, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 4 avril 1592, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 47 ans, et a été enterré à Mirfield, Everwyck, Angleterre.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Wilcockが1545年にイギリスヨークシュアイアミルフィールドで生まれた時，父Richard Wilcockは20歳，母Ann Watterhouseは22歳であった。1570年9月3日にイギリスヨークシュアイアミルフィールドでJennet Foxと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1592年4月4日に故郷で47歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアミルフィールドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Wilcock(이)가 1545년 영국 요르크실르 미르필드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Wilcock(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Ann Watterhouse(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1570년 9월 3일 영국 요르크실르 미르필드에서 Jennet Fox(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1592년 4월 4일 그의 고향에서 47세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 미르필드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Wilcock nasceu em 1545, em Mirfield, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard Wilcock, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Ann Watterhouse, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Jennet Fox em 3 de setembro de 1570, em Mirfield, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 5 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Wilcock родился в 1545 г. в местности мирфиелд, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard Wilcock было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Ann Watterhouse, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Jennet Fox 3 сентября 1570 г. в местности мирфиелд, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 5 дочерей. Он умер 4 апреля 1592 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 47 лет и был похоронен в местности мирфиелд, еркшир, Англия.
